headline: Will Keurig's Brand Strength & Strategic Actions Power Growth?
summary: KDP is fueling growth through coffee leadership, product innovation, premiumization and productivity while expanding into faster-growing beverage categories.

headline: Volume Mix Strength at Keurig: Is Demand Outpacing Pricing?
summary: KDP's Q1 volume/mix gains and U.S. Refreshment Beverages momentum suggest growth may be moving beyond pricing-driven gains.
